z:CompilationOptions.get_fingerprint.<locals>.to_fingerprint)
NotImplementedErrorr
get_fingerprintW
	z"CompilationOptions.get_fingerprint)
    Results from the Cython compiler:
    c_file           string or None   The generated C source file
    h_file           string or None   The generated C header file
    i_file           string or None   The generated .pxi file
    api_file         string or None   The generated C API .h file
    listing_file     string or None   File of error messages
    object_file      string or None   Result of compiling the C file
    extension_file   string or None   Result of linking the object file
    num_errors       integer          Number of compilation errors
    compilation_source CompilationSource
    c
h_fileZ
i_fileZ
api_filer
object_fileZ
extension_filer
CompilationResult.__init__Nr
CompilationResultSetz
    Results from compiling multiple Pyrex source files. A mapping
    from source file paths to CompilationResult instances. Also
    has the following attributes:
    num_errors   integer   Total number of compilation errors
    r
CompilationResultSet.addN)
    compile_single(source, options, full_module_name)
    Compile the given Pyrex implementation file and return a CompilationResult.
    Always compiles a single file; does not perform timestamp checking or
    recursion.
    )
compile_single
    compile_multiple(sources, options)
    Compiles the given sequence of Pyrex implementation files and returns
    a CompilationResultSet. Performs timestamp checking and/or recursion
    if these are specified in the options.
    c
z$compile_multiple.<locals>.<listcomp>Nz
Compiling %s
stderr
writerE
sourcesr'
Z	processed
resultsr
output_filenameZ
out_of_daterK
compile_multiple
    compile(source [, options], [, <option> = <value>]...)
    Compile one or more Pyrex implementation files, with optional timestamp
    checking and recursing on dependencies.  The source argument may be a string
    or a sequence of strings.  If it is a string and no recursion or timestamp
    checking is requested, a CompilationResult is returned, otherwise a
    CompilationResultSet is returned.
    r
kwdsr
compile
}	|	|
    Search the list of include directories for the given file name.
    If a source file position is given, first searches the directory
    containing that file. Returns None if not found, but does not
    report an error.
    The 'include' option will disable package dereferencing.
    r
dirsrT
